---
title: "Pygo_gene_enrichment v10.0 (caching, dynamic orgDb, ggplot2 fixes)"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r config, include=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# USER-EDITABLE CONFIGURATION — edit only this chunk for routine runs
# =============================================================================

## — Input / organism --------------------------------------------------------
input_file         <- "Sacral2024_Sacral_v_Free_realigned_EXAMPLE_DATA.csv"
species_name       <- "chicken"      # label; falls back to "Gallus gallus"
kegg_code          <- "gga"          # KEGG organism code

## — Organism DB lookup -------------------------------------------------------
org_db_lookup <- c(
  gga = "org.Gg.eg.db",   # Gallus gallus (chicken)
  hsa = "org.Hs.eg.db",   # Homo sapiens
  mmu = "org.Mm.eg.db",   # Mus musculus
  rno = "org.Rn.eg.db",   # Rattus norvegicus
  dre = "org.Dr.eg.db",   # Danio rerio
  dme = "org.Dm.eg.db"    # Drosophila
)
orgdb_pkg <- org_db_lookup[kegg_code]
if (is.na(orgdb_pkg))
  stop("kegg_code '", kegg_code, "' not in org_db_lookup. Add it to the table.")

## — Filter thresholds --------------------------------------------------------
padj_cutoff        <- 0.05
logFC_cutoff       <- 2
topN_per_direction <- 2000           # cap up & down separately before ORA
use_table_universe <- TRUE           # FALSE = all-gene orgDb background
minGSSize          <- 10
maxGSSize          <- 500

## — Pathview options ---------------------------------------------------------
pathview_use_sig_only <- TRUE
pathview_padj_cutoff  <- 0.05
pathview_logFC_cutoff <- 2
pathview_non_sig_mode <- "zero"      # "zero" = neutral gray; "na" = hidden

## — Display counts -----------------------------------------------------------
topN_volcano_genes   <- 40           # genes labelled in focused volcano
N_sankey_paths       <- 10           # top KEGG pathways in Sankey
N_gsea_running_score <- 3            # GSEA running-score panels
N_leading_edge_top   <- 25           # bar chart genes per leading-edge term
N_neural_ridgeplot   <- 15           # terms in neural ridgeplot

## — Misc ---------------------------------------------------------------------
install_missing    <- FALSE          # set TRUE for auto-install of missing pkgs
set.seed(0666)

## — Targeted pathways (name → KEGG ID) --------------------------------------
targeted_pathways <- c(
  Apoptosis                              = "gga04210",
  Pyroptosis                             = "gga04216",
  Necroptosis                            = "gga04217",
  Pyroptosis_ko                          = "gga04225",   # renamed: dup key fixed
  `HIF-1 signaling`                      = "gga04066",
  `VEGF signaling`                       = "gga04370",
  `ECM-receptor interaction`             = "gga04512",
  `Focal adhesion`                       = "gga04510",
  `Arachidonic acid metabolism`          = "gga00590",
  `Osteoclast differentiation`           = "gga04380",
  `Development and regeneration`         = "gga04382",
  `TGF-beta signaling`                   = "gga04350",
  `MAPK signaling`                       = "gga04010",
  `Cytokine-cytokine receptor interaction` = "gga04060"
)

## — Neural keyword filter ----------------------------------------------------
neural_keywords <- unique(c(
  "neuro","neuron","neura","neural","synap","axon","dendrit","neur","brain","nerv",
  "glia","myelin","schwann","spine","plasticity","cerebral","cerebell","cortex",
  "spinal","ganglia","astrocyte","oligodendro","hippocamp","amygdala","neurite",
  "neuritogen","growth cone","axon elongat","axon outgrowth","axon extension",
  "dendrite outgrowth","dendrite extension","neuron projection","neuronal projection",
  "growth-cone cytoskeleton","filopodia","lamellipod","microtubule polymeriz",
  "actin cytoskelet","neurotransm","neuropept","neuromodul","autonom",
  "sympathetic","parasympathetic","neuromuscular","neurogenesis","axonogen",
  "myelination","microglia",
  "Nervous system","Neurodegenerative","Sensory system"
))
neural_pattern <- paste(neural_keywords, collapse = "|")

## — Output directories -------------------------------------------------------
outdir           <- "output"
dir_plots        <- file.path(outdir, "plots")
dir_dotplots     <- file.path(outdir, "plots", "dotplots")
dir_neural_plots <- file.path(outdir, "plots", "neural")
dir_data         <- file.path(outdir, "data")
dir_pathview     <- file.path(outdir, "pathview")
dir_interactive  <- file.path(outdir, "interactive")
dir_cache        <- file.path(outdir, "cache")
dir_add          <- file.path(outdir, "additional")

for (d in c(outdir, dir_plots, dir_dotplots, dir_neural_plots,
            dir_data, dir_pathview, dir_interactive, dir_cache, dir_add)) {
  dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}
```

```{r packages, include=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# PACKAGES
# =============================================================================
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_pkgs <- c("UpSetR","EnhancedVolcano","stringr","glue","openxlsx",
               "ggplot2","dplyr","tidyr","networkD3","htmlwidgets","grid","png",
               "withr")

bio_pkgs  <- c("clusterProfiler","ReactomePA","pathview","AnnotationDbi",
               "ComplexHeatmap","circlize","KEGGREST", orgdb_pkg,
               "BiocParallel","enrichplot")

maybe_install <- function(pkgs, bioc = FALSE) {
  for (p in pkgs) {
    if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE) && isTRUE(install_missing)) {
      if (bioc) BiocManager::install(p, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
      else      install.packages(p, dependencies = TRUE)
    }
  }
}
maybe_install(cran_pkgs, bioc = FALSE)
maybe_install(bio_pkgs,  bioc = TRUE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(clusterProfiler); library(ReactomePA);    library(pathview)
  library(AnnotationDbi);   library(dplyr);         library(ggplot2)
  library(openxlsx);        library(ComplexHeatmap); library(circlize)
  library(UpSetR);          library(EnhancedVolcano); library(enrichplot)
  library(stringr);         library(glue);           library(KEGGREST)
  library(tidyr);           library(BiocParallel)
  library(grid);            library(networkD3);      library(htmlwidgets)
  library(withr)
})

library(orgdb_pkg, character.only = TRUE)
orgDb <- get(orgdb_pkg)

# Parallel workers (Windows: SnowParam; others: MulticoreParam)
if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  param <- SnowParam(workers = max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 1))
} else {
  param <- MulticoreParam(workers = max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 1))
}
register(param)

theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 11))
```

```{r helpers, include=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# HELPER FUNCTIONS
# =============================================================================

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# detect_columns(df)
#   Flexible column detection by common name aliases; falls back to positions.
#   Returns: named int vector c(gcol, lcol, pcol)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
detect_columns <- function(df) {
  normalize_nm <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "", x))
  nm <- normalize_nm(names(df))
  find_col <- function(cands, default_idx) {
    idx <- which(nm %in% normalize_nm(cands))
    if (length(idx) == 0) default_idx else idx[1]
  }
  gene_cands  <- c("gene","genes","symbol","gene_symbol","hgnc","mgi",
                   "ensembl","ensemblid","ensembl_id")
  logfc_cands <- c("logfc","log2fc","log2foldchange","log2_fold_change",
                   "lfc","log2fc.wald","stat")
  padj_cands  <- c("padj","p_adj","p.adjust","p_adjust","adj.p.val",
                   "adj_p_val","fdr","qvalue","q_value")
  c(gcol = find_col(gene_cands,  1L),
    lcol = find_col(logfc_cands, 2L),
    pcol = find_col(padj_cands,  3L))
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# map_gene_ids(df, orgDb, keytype = NULL)
#   Detects Ensembl vs Symbol, maps to ENTREZID/SYMBOL, drops unmatched rows.
#   Returns: augmented tibble with ENTREZID, SYMBOL, gene_label columns
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
map_gene_ids <- function(df, orgDb, keytype = NULL) {
  if (is.null(keytype)) {
    keytype <- if (all(grepl("^ENS", df$gene, ignore.case = FALSE))) "ENSEMBL" else "SYMBOL"
  }
  message("Detected keytype: ", keytype)
  map_cols <- if (keytype == "ENSEMBL") c("ENTREZID","SYMBOL") else c("ENTREZID","ENSEMBL")
  gene_map <- AnnotationDbi::select(orgDb, keys = df$gene,
                                    columns = map_cols, keytype = keytype)
  df <- dplyr::left_join(df, gene_map, by = setNames(keytype, "gene")) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))
  if (!"SYMBOL" %in% names(df)) df$SYMBOL <- NA_character_
  df <- df %>% dplyr::mutate(gene_label = dplyr::coalesce(SYMBOL, gene))
  df
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# render_pathway(pathway_id, gene_data, kegg_outdir, label, out_suffix, ...)
#   Renders a pathview diagram using withr::with_dir (no setwd side-effects).
#   try_ko_retry=TRUE also renders the ko reference map.
#   Returns: data.frame of render metadata row(s), or NULL on total failure
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
render_pathway <- function(pathway_id, gene_data, kegg_outdir, label,
                           out_suffix, ko_gene_data = NULL,
                           kegg_desc = NULL, try_ko_retry = FALSE) {
  rows       <- list()
  use_species <- if (startsWith(pathway_id, "ko")) "ko" else kegg_code
  clean_id   <- sub("^(gga|ko)", "", pathway_id)
  kegg_id    <- paste0(use_species, clean_id)
  safe_sfx   <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", tolower(out_suffix))

  # Primary render
  tryCatch({
    withr::with_dir(kegg_outdir, {
      pathview(gene.data  = gene_data,
               pathway.id = clean_id,
               species    = use_species,
               out.suffix = paste0("logFC_", safe_sfx))
    })
    basefile <- paste0(kegg_id, ".logFC_", safe_sfx)
    png_file <- file.path(kegg_outdir, paste0(basefile, ".png"))
    labeled  <- label_png(png_file, paste(label, kegg_id, sep = " - "))
    rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      Pathway_ID  = kegg_id,
      Description = label,
      Species     = use_species,
      PNG_File    = file.path("pathview", basename(if (is.null(labeled)) png_file else labeled)),
      PDF_File    = file.path("pathview", paste0(basefile, ".pdf")),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }, error = function(e) message("Pathview error for ", kegg_id, ": ", e$message))

  # Optional ko retry
  if (isTRUE(try_ko_retry) && use_species != "ko" && !is.null(ko_gene_data)) {
    message("Retrying ", label, " with KEGG 'ko' reference map.")
    tryCatch({
      ko_sfx <- paste0(safe_sfx, "_ko")
      withr::with_dir(kegg_outdir, {
        pathview(gene.data  = ko_gene_data,
                 pathway.id = clean_id,
                 species    = "ko",
                 out.suffix = paste0("logFC_", ko_sfx))
      })
      basefile <- paste0("ko", clean_id, ".logFC_", ko_sfx)
      png_file <- file.path(kegg_outdir, paste0(basefile, ".png"))
      labeled  <- label_png(png_file, paste(label, "ko", clean_id, sep = " - "))
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        Pathway_ID  = paste0("ko", clean_id),
        Description = label,
        Species     = "ko",
        PNG_File    = file.path("pathview", basename(if (is.null(labeled)) png_file else labeled)),
        PDF_File    = file.path("pathview", paste0(basefile, ".pdf")),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }, error = function(e2) message("Pathview ko error for ", pathway_id, ": ", e2$message))
  }

  if (length(rows) == 0) return(NULL)
  do.call(rbind, rows)
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# save_plot(p, filename, w=7, h=5, subdir=NULL)
#   Saves PDF always; SVG too if svglite is available.
#   subdir defaults to dir_plots when NULL is passed.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
save_plot <- local({
  can_svg <- suppressWarnings(requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE))
  function(p, filename, w = 7, h = 5, subdir = NULL) {
    base <- if (is.null(subdir)) dir_plots else subdir
    fpdf <- file.path(base, filename)
    ggsave(fpdf, plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in", dpi = 300)
    if (endsWith(filename, ".pdf") && isTRUE(can_svg)) {
      fsvg <- file.path(base, sub("\\.pdf$", ".svg", filename))
      ggsave(fsvg, plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in", dpi = 300)
    }
  }
})

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# export_sheets(sheet_list, filename, subdir = dir_data)
#   Writes a named list of data frames to a multi-sheet xlsx.
#   Returns: invisible file path
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
export_sheets <- function(sheet_list, filename, subdir = dir_data) {
  wb <- openxlsx::createWorkbook()
  for (nm in names(sheet_list)) {
    openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, nm)
    df <- sheet_list[[nm]]
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(as.data.frame(df)) == 0) {
      openxlsx::writeData(wb, nm, data.frame(Note = "No results"))
    } else {
      openxlsx::writeData(wb, nm, as.data.frame(df))
    }
  }
  out <- file.path(subdir, filename)
  openxlsx::saveWorkbook(wb, out, overwrite = TRUE)
  invisible(out)
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# filter_neural(result_obj, pattern = neural_pattern)
#   Accepts S4 enrichResult or plain data.frame; always returns data.frame.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
filter_neural <- function(result_obj, pattern = neural_pattern) {
  df <- if (inherits(result_obj, "data.frame")) result_obj else as.data.frame(result_obj)
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0 || !"Description" %in% names(df)) return(data.frame())
  df[grepl(pattern, df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# safe_run(expr, label = "")
#   Wraps tryCatch; returns result or NULL on error.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
safe_run <- function(expr, label = "") {
  tryCatch(expr, error = function(e) {
    message(if (nzchar(label)) paste0("[", label, "] "), "Error: ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
}

# — Utility helpers (unchanged from v8) ----------------------------------------

label_png <- function(infile, label, outfile = NULL) {
  if (!requireNamespace("png", quietly = TRUE)) return(invisible(NULL))
  if (!file.exists(infile)) return(invisible(NULL))
  if (is.null(outfile)) outfile <- sub("\\.png$", "_labeled.png", infile)
  img <- png::readPNG(infile)
  png(filename = outfile, width = dim(img)[2], height = dim(img)[1])
  grid::grid.raster(img, width = unit(1, "npc"), height = unit(1, "npc"))
  grid::grid.text(label, x = unit(0.02, "npc"), y = unit(0.98, "npc"),
                  just = c("left","top"),
                  gp = grid::gpar(col = "black", fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"))
  dev.off()
  outfile
}

as_df <- function(res, id_col = "geneID") {
  if (is.null(res) || nrow(as.data.frame(res)) == 0) return(data.frame())
  dplyr::rename(as.data.frame(res), Genes = !!id_col)
}

kegg_pathway_exists <- function(pid, kegg_desc) {
  pid <- sub("^path:", "", pid)
  any(names(kegg_desc) == paste0("path:", pid))
}

get_kegg_pathway_genes <- function(pid, kegg_desc) {
  pid <- sub("^path:", "", pid)
  if (!kegg_pathway_exists(pid, kegg_desc)) return(character(0))
  info <- tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggGet(pid), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(info) || length(info) == 0 || is.null(info[[1]]$GENE)) return(character(0))
  gene_entries <- info[[1]]$GENE
  gene_ids <- as.character(gene_entries[seq(1, length(gene_entries), 2)])
  gene_ids[!is.na(gene_ids)]
}

make_dot <- function(res, stub, title, n_cat = 15, wrap_width = 45,
                     text_size = 9, text_angle = 0, w = 7, h = 5,
                     subdir = dir_dotplots) {
  df <- as.data.frame(res); if (nrow(df) == 0) return(invisible())
  df <- df[seq_len(min(n_cat, nrow(df))), ]
  df$Description <- stringr::str_wrap(df$Description, width = wrap_width)
  if (all(c("GeneRatio","Count") %in% names(df))) {
    df$GeneRatioNum <- vapply(strsplit(df$GeneRatio, "/"),
                              function(x) as.numeric(x[1]) / as.numeric(x[2]), numeric(1))
    x_var <- "GeneRatioNum"; x_lab <- "Gene ratio"; size_var <- "Count"
  } else if (all(c("NES","setSize") %in% names(df))) {
    x_var <- "NES"; x_lab <- "NES"; size_var <- "setSize"
  } else return(invisible())
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x_var]],
                      y = reorder(Description, .data[[x_var]]),
                      size = .data[[size_var]],
                      colour = p.adjust)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_colour_continuous(trans = "reverse", name = "adj-P") +
    scale_size(range = c(2, 6)) +
    labs(title = title, x = x_lab, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = text_size, angle = text_angle,
                                     hjust = ifelse(text_angle == 0, 1, 0.5)))
  save_plot(p, sprintf("dotplot_%s.pdf", stub), w, h, subdir = subdir)
}

make_upset <- function(term_list, tag, subdir = dir_plots) {
  comb_mat <- ComplexHeatmap::make_comb_mat(term_list)
  comb_mat <- comb_mat[order(ComplexHeatmap::comb_size(comb_mat), decreasing = TRUE)]
  left_anno <- ComplexHeatmap::rowAnnotation(
    "Set size" = ComplexHeatmap::anno_barplot(
      ComplexHeatmap::set_size(comb_mat),
      gp = grid::gpar(fill = "grey40"), border = FALSE,
      bar_width = 0.9, axis_param = list(side = "bottom")))
  top_anno <- ComplexHeatmap::upset_top_annotation(
    comb_mat, add_numbers = TRUE, gp = grid::gpar(fill = "steelblue"))
  for (ext in c("pdf","png")) {
    outf <- file.path(subdir, glue("upset_{tag}.{ext}"))
    if (ext == "pdf") pdf(outf, 7, 5) else png(outf, 1400, 1000, res = 200)
    ht <- ComplexHeatmap::UpSet(
      comb_mat, left_annotation = left_anno, top_annotation = top_anno,
      show_row_names = TRUE,
      row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
      set_order = rev(names(term_list)))
    ComplexHeatmap::draw(ht); dev.off()
  }
  mat <- UpSetR::fromList(term_list)
  pdf(file.path(subdir, glue("upset_{tag}_UpSetR.pdf")), 8, 6)
  UpSetR::upset(mat, sets = colnames(mat), nsets = ncol(mat), nintersects = NA,
                order.by = "freq", keep.order = TRUE, main.bar.color = "darkred",
                sets.bar.color = "steelblue")
  try({
    bars_y <- grid::convertY(grid::unit(UpSetR::upset_plot_env$Main_bar_y, "native"),
                             "npc", valueOnly = TRUE)
    bars_x <- grid::convertX(grid::unit(UpSetR::upset_plot_env$Main_bar_x, "native"),
                             "npc", valueOnly = TRUE)
    counts <- UpSetR::upset_plot_env$Main_bar_data$freq
    grid::grid.text(counts, x = bars_x, y = bars_y + 0.02, gp = grid::gpar(cex = 0.7))
  }, silent = TRUE)
  dev.off()
}
```

```{r data-prep, include=FALSE, cache=TRUE, cache.extra=tools::md5sum(input_file), cache.path="output/cache/"}
# =============================================================================
# DATA PREPARATION
# =============================================================================

tbl_raw <- read.csv(input_file, check.names = FALSE)

if (ncol(tbl_raw) < 3)
  stop("Expected at least 3 columns (gene, logFC, padj). Got: ", ncol(tbl_raw))

# Uniquify duplicate header names for safe extraction
orig_names <- names(tbl_raw)
names(tbl_raw) <- make.unique(orig_names)

cols <- detect_columns(tbl_raw)
gcol <- cols["gcol"]; lcol <- cols["lcol"]; pcol <- cols["pcol"]

# Build clean 3-column table with numeric coercion
suppressWarnings({
  tbl <- tibble::tibble(
    gene  = as.character(tbl_raw[[gcol]]),
    logFC = as.numeric(tbl_raw[[lcol]]),
    padj  = as.numeric(tbl_raw[[pcol]])
  )
})

if (all(is.na(tbl$logFC)))
  stop("Could not parse logFC column as numeric (source col index ", lcol, ").")
if (all(is.na(tbl$padj)))
  stop("Could not parse padj column as numeric (source col index ", pcol, ").")

# Strip Ensembl version suffix (e.g. ENSGALG00000000001.3 → ...0001)
tbl$gene <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", tbl$gene)

# Map to ENTREZID + SYMBOL
tbl <- map_gene_ids(tbl, orgDb)

# Universe
if (use_table_universe) {
  gene_universe <- unique(as.character(tbl$ENTREZID))
} else {
  gene_universe <- keys(orgDb, keytype = "ENTREZID")
}

# Significant gene sets (capped per direction)
tbl_sig_base <- tbl %>% dplyr::filter(padj < padj_cutoff, abs(logFC) >= logFC_cutoff)
up_sig   <- tbl_sig_base %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0) %>%
            dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(logFC)) %>% dplyr::slice_head(n = topN_per_direction)
down_sig <- tbl_sig_base %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0) %>%
            dplyr::arrange(logFC) %>% dplyr::slice_head(n = topN_per_direction)
tbl_sig  <- dplyr::bind_rows(up_sig, down_sig)
sig_genes <- unique(as.character(tbl_sig$ENTREZID))

# Summary statistics
num_input    <- nrow(tbl_raw)
num_mapped   <- nrow(tbl)
num_unmapped <- num_input - num_mapped
num_universe <- length(gene_universe)
num_sig      <- length(sig_genes)
pct_sig      <- if (num_universe > 0) 100 * num_sig / num_universe else NA_real_

cat(sprintf(
  "\n====== SUMMARY ======\nInput genes : %d\nMapped genes: %d\nUnmapped    : %d\nUniverse    : %d\nTest set    : %d (%.1f%%)\n",
  num_input, num_mapped, num_unmapped, num_universe, num_sig, pct_sig))

summary_stats <- data.frame(
  Step       = c("Input genes","Mapped genes","Unmapped genes","Universe","Test set"),
  Gene_Count = c(num_input, num_mapped, num_unmapped, num_universe, num_sig),
  Percent    = c(NA,
                 if (num_input > 0) 100 * num_mapped / num_input else NA,
                 if (num_input > 0) 100 * num_unmapped / num_input else NA,
                 NA, pct_sig)
)

# Up/down counts table
up_down_counts <- tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Regulation = dplyr::case_when(
    logFC >=  logFC_cutoff & padj < padj_cutoff ~ "Up",
    logFC <= -logFC_cutoff & padj < padj_cutoff ~ "Down",
    TRUE ~ "NoChange")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Regulation %in% c("Up","Down")) %>%
  dplyr::count(Regulation, name = "Gene_Count") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Percent = round(100 * Gene_Count / sum(Gene_Count), 1))

# Per-gene logFC summary
gene_common_summary <- tbl %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ENTREZID, gene_label) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Avg_LogFC = mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE),
    Avg_Padj  = mean(padj, na.rm = TRUE),
    N_Records = dplyr::n(),
    Direction = dplyr::case_when(
      mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE) >=  logFC_cutoff ~ "Up",
      mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE) <= -logFC_cutoff ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ "NoChange"),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(Avg_LogFC)))
```

```{r enrichment, include=FALSE, cache=TRUE, dependson="data-prep", cache.path="output/cache/"}
# =============================================================================
# ENRICHMENT — GSEA ranks + ORA + GSEA + KEGG CLASS annotation
# =============================================================================

# Validate species label
valid_species <- c("Gallus gallus","chicken","gallus gallus")
if (!tolower(species_name) %in% tolower(valid_species)) {
  warning(glue::glue("Unknown species_name '{species_name}'. Using 'Gallus gallus'."))
  species_name <- "Gallus gallus"
} else if (tolower(species_name) != "gallus gallus") {
  species_name <- "Gallus gallus"
}

# GSEA rank vector (prefer stat column, fall back to logFC)
rank_col <- if ("stat" %in% names(tbl)) "stat" else "logFC"
tbl_nodup <- tbl %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ENTREZID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_max(order_by = abs(.data[[rank_col]]), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()
ranks <- tbl_nodup %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data[[rank_col]])) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(ENTREZID, rnk = .data[[rank_col]]) %>%
  tibble::deframe()

# — GO BP / MF ORA -----------------------------------------------------------
ego <- safe_run(enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, OrgDb = orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID",
  ont = "BP", universe = gene_universe, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable = TRUE, minGSSize = minGSSize, maxGSSize = maxGSSize), "enrichGO BP")
if (is.null(ego)) ego <- new("enrichResult")

ego_MF <- safe_run(enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, OrgDb = orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID",
  ont = "MF", universe = gene_universe, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable = TRUE, minGSSize = minGSSize, maxGSSize = maxGSSize), "enrichGO MF")
if (is.null(ego_MF)) ego_MF <- new("enrichResult")

ego    <- tryCatch(simplify(ego,    cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min),
                   error = function(e) ego)
ego_MF <- tryCatch(simplify(ego_MF, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min),
                   error = function(e) ego_MF)

# — KEGG ORA (via KEGGREST + enricher, with caching) -------------------------
safe_keggLink <- function(to, org) tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggLink(to, org), error = function(e) NULL)
safe_keggList <- function(db, org) tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggList(db, org), error = function(e) NULL)

cache_maps <- file.path(dir_data, "kegg_maps.rds")
if (file.exists(cache_maps)) {
  kmaps <- readRDS(cache_maps)
  kmap  <- kmaps$kmap; kdesc <- kmaps$kdesc
} else {
  kmap  <- safe_keggLink("pathway", kegg_code)
  kdesc <- safe_keggList("pathway", kegg_code)
  if (is.null(kmap) || is.null(kdesc)) stop("KEGGREST failed; check network and retry.")
  saveRDS(list(kmap = kmap, kdesc = kdesc), cache_maps)
  writeLines(paste("KEGG mappings fetched:", Sys.Date()),
             file.path(dir_data, "KEGG_fetch_date.txt"))
}

kegg_term2gene <- data.frame(
  term = sub("path:",            "", unname(kmap)),
  gene = sub(paste0(kegg_code, ":"), "", names(kmap)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
kegg_term2name <- data.frame(
  term = sub("path:", "", names(kdesc)),
  name = sub(" - .*", "", unname(kdesc)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# KO mapping (for ko-species pathview rendering)
cache_ko_map <- file.path(dir_data, "kegg_ko_map.rds")
if (file.exists(cache_ko_map)) {
  ko_map <- readRDS(cache_ko_map)
} else {
  ko_map <- safe_keggLink("ko", kegg_code)
  if (!is.null(ko_map)) saveRDS(ko_map, cache_ko_map)
}
ko_fc_vec <- numeric(0)
if (!is.null(ko_map)) {
  ko_df <- data.frame(
    ENTREZID = sub(paste0("^", kegg_code, ":"), "", names(ko_map)),
    KO       = sub("^ko:", "", unname(ko_map)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  ko_fc_tbl <- tbl %>%
    dplyr::select(ENTREZID, logFC) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(ko_df, by = "ENTREZID") %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(KO)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(KO) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(logFC = mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  ko_fc_vec <- setNames(ko_fc_tbl$logFC, ko_fc_tbl$KO)
}

ekegg <- safe_run(enricher(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
  TERM2GENE = kegg_term2gene, TERM2NAME = kegg_term2name,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH", minGSSize = minGSSize, maxGSSize = maxGSSize), "KEGG ORA")
if (is.null(ekegg)) ekegg <- new("enrichResult")

if (nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) > 0)
  ekegg <- setReadable(ekegg, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")
ekegg_df <- as.data.frame(ekegg)
if (nrow(ekegg_df) == 0) ekegg_df <- tibble::tibble()

# — Reactome ORA -------------------------------------------------------------
ereact <- tryCatch(
  enrichPathway(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe, organism = "chicken",
                pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE,
                minGSSize = minGSSize, maxGSSize = maxGSSize),
  error = function(e) {
    message("ReactomePA::enrichPathway failed: ", e$message)
    new("enrichResult")
  })
if (inherits(ereact, "enrichResult") && nrow(as.data.frame(ereact)) > 0)
  ereact <- setReadable(ereact, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

# — GSEA (GO BP, GO MF, KEGG) ------------------------------------------------
gsea_go <- safe_run(gseGO(geneList = ranks, OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH", minGSSize = minGSSize, maxGSSize = maxGSSize), "gseGO BP")
if (is.null(gsea_go)) gsea_go <- new("enrichResult")

gsea_go_readable <- setReadable(gsea_go, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

gsea_go_MF <- safe_run(gseGO(geneList = ranks, OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "MF",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH", minGSSize = minGSSize, maxGSSize = maxGSSize), "gseGO MF")
if (is.null(gsea_go_MF)) gsea_go_MF <- new("enrichResult")

gsea_kegg <- safe_run(gseKEGG(geneList = ranks, organism = kegg_code,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH", minGSSize = minGSSize, maxGSSize = maxGSSize,
  verbose = FALSE), "gseKEGG")
if (is.null(gsea_kegg)) gsea_kegg <- new("enrichResult")

# — KEGG CLASS annotation ----------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(ekegg_df) > 0) {
  message("Annotating KEGG pathways with CLASS...")
  kinfo <- tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggGet(ekegg_df$ID), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(kinfo)) {
    class_df <- data.frame(
      ID    = vapply(kinfo, function(x) sub("path:", "", x$ENTRY),  ""),
      Class = vapply(kinfo, function(x) paste(x$CLASS, collapse = "; "), ""),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    ekegg_df <- dplyr::left_join(ekegg_df, class_df, by = "ID")
    ekegg@result <- ekegg_df
  }
}

# Convenience fold-change vector (ENTREZID → logFC)
fc_vec <- setNames(tbl$logFC, tbl$ENTREZID)
```

```{r pathview, include=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# PATHVIEW DIAGRAMS
# =============================================================================

kegg_guide           <- NULL
target_pathway_guide <- NULL

# Build pathview gene data vector (optionally zero/NA non-significant genes)
pathview_fc_vec <- fc_vec
if (isTRUE(pathview_use_sig_only)) {
  sig_ids <- tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(padj < pathview_padj_cutoff, abs(logFC) >= pathview_logFC_cutoff) %>%
    dplyr::pull(ENTREZID) %>% unique()
  non_sig <- !names(pathview_fc_vec) %in% sig_ids
  if (identical(pathview_non_sig_mode, "zero")) {
    pathview_fc_vec[non_sig] <- 0
  } else {
    pathview_fc_vec[non_sig] <- NA_real_
  }
}

all_pathview_guides    <- list()
kegg_pathway_gene_checks <- list()

# — Top KEGG ORA pathways ----------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(ekegg_df) > 0) {
  top_kegg <- head(ekegg_df$ID,          N_sankey_paths)
  top_desc <- head(ekegg_df$Description, N_sankey_paths)
  guide_rows <- list()
  for (i in seq_along(top_kegg)) {
    message("Rendering KEGG diagram for ", top_kegg[i])
    rows <- render_pathway(
      pathway_id  = top_kegg[i],
      gene_data   = pathview_fc_vec,
      kegg_outdir = dir_pathview,
      label       = top_desc[i],
      out_suffix  = top_desc[i])
    if (!is.null(rows)) guide_rows <- c(guide_rows, list(rows))
  }
  if (length(guide_rows) > 0) {
    kegg_guide <- do.call(rbind, guide_rows)
    all_pathview_guides$Top_KEGG_ORA <- kegg_guide
  }
}

# — Targeted pathway list ----------------------------------------------------
target_guide_rows <- list()
for (path_name in names(targeted_pathways)) {
  pid <- targeted_pathways[[path_name]]
  message("Rendering targeted pathway: ", path_name, " (", pid, ")")
  rows <- render_pathway(
    pathway_id   = pid,
    gene_data    = pathview_fc_vec,
    kegg_outdir  = dir_pathview,
    label        = path_name,
    out_suffix   = path_name,
    ko_gene_data = ko_fc_vec,
    kegg_desc    = kdesc,
    try_ko_retry = TRUE)
  if (!is.null(rows)) target_guide_rows <- c(target_guide_rows, list(rows))

  # Gene-presence check
  clean_id <- sub("^(gga|ko)", "", pid)
  use_species <- if (startsWith(pid, "ko")) "ko" else kegg_code
  kegg_id <- paste0(use_species, clean_id)
  pathway_genes <- get_kegg_pathway_genes(kegg_id, kdesc)
  genes_in_data <- intersect(pathway_genes, as.character(tbl$ENTREZID))
  kegg_pathway_gene_checks[[length(kegg_pathway_gene_checks) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    Pathway_Name        = path_name,
    Pathway_ID          = kegg_id,
    Total_Pathway_Genes = length(pathway_genes),
    Genes_In_Dataset    = length(genes_in_data),
    Dataset_EntrezIDs   = paste(genes_in_data, collapse = "/"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

# Forced ko reference map for osteoclast differentiation
message("Rendering forced ko reference map for osteoclast differentiation (map04380).")
forced_rows <- render_pathway(
  pathway_id   = "ko04380",
  gene_data    = ko_fc_vec,
  kegg_outdir  = dir_pathview,
  label        = "Osteoclast differentiation (forced ko map)",
  out_suffix   = "osteoclast_forced_ko")
if (!is.null(forced_rows)) target_guide_rows <- c(target_guide_rows, list(forced_rows))

if (length(target_guide_rows) > 0) {
  target_pathway_guide <- do.call(rbind, target_guide_rows)
  all_pathview_guides$Targeted_Pathways <- target_pathway_guide
}
if (length(kegg_pathway_gene_checks) > 0)
  kegg_pathway_gene_checks <- do.call(rbind, kegg_pathway_gene_checks)
```

```{r exports, include=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# EXPORTS — all write operations in one place
# =============================================================================

# Summary stats
openxlsx::write.xlsx(summary_stats,
                     file = file.path(dir_data, "summary_stats.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

# Per-gene logFC summary
write.csv(gene_common_summary,
          file = file.path(dir_data, "common_gene_logFC_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
openxlsx::write.xlsx(gene_common_summary,
                     file = file.path(dir_data, "common_gene_logFC_summary.xlsx"),
                     overwrite = TRUE)

# Up / down summary
export_sheets(
  list(UpDown_Counts = up_down_counts, Up_Genes = up_sig, Down_Genes = down_sig),
  "up_vs_down_summary.xlsx")

# Main enrichment results
export_sheets(
  list(GO_BP_ORA    = as_df(ego),
       GO_MF_ORA    = as_df(ego_MF),
       KEGG_ORA     = as_df(ekegg),
       Reactome_ORA = as_df(ereact),
       GO_BP_GSEA   = as_df(gsea_go,    "core_enrichment"),
       GO_MF_GSEA   = as_df(gsea_go_MF, "core_enrichment"),
       Summary      = summary_stats),
  "enrichment_results_with_genes_and_summary.xlsx")

# KEGG GSEA
openxlsx::write.xlsx(as.data.frame(gsea_kegg),
                     file = file.path(dir_data, "KEGG_GSEA_results.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

# GSEA leading-edge genes (built here, used in plots chunk)
if (nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0) {
  top_gsea <- head(gsea_go@result, N_gsea_running_score)
  leading_edge_long <- top_gsea %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, core_enrichment, NES, p.adjust) %>%
    tidyr::separate_rows(core_enrichment, sep = "/") %>%
    dplyr::rename(ENTREZID = core_enrichment) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(tbl[, c("ENTREZID","gene_label","logFC")], by = "ENTREZID")
  openxlsx::write.xlsx(leading_edge_long,
                       file = file.path(dir_data, "gsea_leading_edge_genes.xlsx"),
                       overwrite = TRUE)
} else {
  leading_edge_long <- data.frame()
}

# Pathview guide tables
if (!is.null(kegg_guide)) {
  write.csv(kegg_guide,  file = file.path(dir_data, "kegg_pathview_guide.csv"),  row.names = FALSE)
  openxlsx::write.xlsx(kegg_guide, file = file.path(dir_data, "kegg_pathview_guide.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)
}
if (!is.null(target_pathway_guide)) {
  write.csv(target_pathway_guide,
            file = file.path(dir_data, "kegg_pathview_targeted_guide.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  openxlsx::write.xlsx(target_pathway_guide,
                       file = file.path(dir_data, "kegg_pathview_targeted_guide.xlsx"),
                       overwrite = TRUE)
}
if (length(all_pathview_guides) > 0)
  export_sheets(all_pathview_guides, "kegg_pathview_guides_all.xlsx")

if (is.data.frame(kegg_pathway_gene_checks) && nrow(kegg_pathway_gene_checks) > 0) {
  write.csv(kegg_pathway_gene_checks,
            file = file.path(dir_data, "kegg_target_pathway_gene_checks.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  openxlsx::write.xlsx(kegg_pathway_gene_checks,
                       file = file.path(dir_data, "kegg_target_pathway_gene_checks.xlsx"),
                       overwrite = TRUE)
}

# Diagnostic barplots (base graphics → data dir)
if (num_universe > 0) {
  pdf(file.path(dir_data, "testset_vs_universe_pie.pdf"), 5, 5)
  pie(c(num_sig, max(0, num_universe - num_sig)),
      labels = c(sprintf("Test set\n(%d)", num_sig),
                 sprintf("Universe\n(%d)", max(0, num_universe - num_sig))),
      col = c("deepskyblue","grey90"),
      main = "Genes in Test Set vs. Universe")
  dev.off()
}

bar_vals <- c(Input = num_input, Mapped = num_mapped,
              Universe = num_universe, TestSet = num_sig)
pdf(file.path(dir_data, "gene_counts_barplot.pdf"), 5, 4)
barplot(bar_vals, main = "Gene Counts at Key Steps", ylab = "Number of genes",
        col = "darkseagreen", ylim = c(0, max(bar_vals, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1))
dev.off()
```

```{r plots, include=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# PLOTS — volcano, UpSet, dotplots, cnet, emap, GSEA running score,
#          leading-edge bars, Sankey
# =============================================================================

# — Volcano plots ------------------------------------------------------------
volc <- EnhancedVolcano(tbl, lab = tbl$gene_label,
                        x = "logFC", y = "padj",
                        xlab = bquote(~Log[2]~" fold change"),
                        pCutoff = padj_cutoff, FCcutoff = logFC_cutoff)
save_plot(volc, "volcano_plot.pdf", 7, 6)

tbl_top <- tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(padj < padj_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(padj, dplyr::desc(abs(logFC))) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = topN_volcano_genes)

volc_focus <- EnhancedVolcano(tbl, lab = tbl$gene_label,
                              x = "logFC", y = "padj",
                              pCutoff = padj_cutoff, FCcutoff = logFC_cutoff,
                              selectLab = tbl_top$gene_label,
                              labSize = 5, colAlpha = 0.6,
                              title    = glue::glue("Focused volcano ({topN_volcano_genes} top genes highlighted)"),
                              subtitle = "Ordered by adjusted P-value then |log2FC|",
                              caption  = "")
save_plot(volc_focus, "volcano_top_genes_large.pdf", 9, 8)

# |log2FC| distribution barplot
pdf(file.path(dir_plots, "logFC_bins_barplot.pdf"), 6, 4)
barplot(
  table(cut(abs(tbl$logFC), c(0,1,2,4,8,Inf),
            labels = c("<1","1-2","2-4","4-8",">8"))),
  main = "Distribution of |log2FC|", ylab = "Gene count", xlab = "|log2FC| bin")
dev.off()

# — UpSet plots --------------------------------------------------------------
get_desc <- function(obj) {
  if (is.null(obj)) return(character(0))
  df <- as.data.frame(obj)
  if (!"Description" %in% names(df)) return(character(0))
  na.omit(unique(df$Description))
}
pretty_names <- c(GO_BP_ORA = "GO-BP ORA", KEGG_ORA = "KEGG ORA",
                  Reactome_ORA = "Reactome ORA",
                  GO_BP_GSEA = "GO-BP GSEA", GO_MF_GSEA = "GO-MF GSEA")
terms_all <- Filter(length, list(
  GO_BP_ORA    = get_desc(ego),
  KEGG_ORA     = get_desc(ekegg),
  Reactome_ORA = get_desc(ereact),
  GO_BP_GSEA   = get_desc(gsea_go),
  GO_MF_GSEA   = get_desc(gsea_go_MF)))
names(terms_all) <- pretty_names[names(terms_all)]

if (length(terms_all) >= 2) {
  make_upset(terms_all, "full")
} else {
  message("Insufficient sets for full UpSet plot.")
}

terms_neural <- Filter(length, lapply(terms_all, function(v)
  v[grepl(neural_pattern, v, ignore.case = TRUE)]))
if (length(terms_neural) >= 2) {
  make_upset(terms_neural, "neural")
} else {
  message("Insufficient neural sets for UpSet plot.")
}

# — Dotplots -----------------------------------------------------------------
make_dot(ego,        "GO_ORA",       "GO BP ORA")
make_dot(ego_MF,     "GO_MF_ORA",    "GO MF ORA")
make_dot(ekegg,      "KEGG_ORA",     "KEGG ORA")
make_dot(ereact,     "Reactome_ORA", "Reactome ORA")
make_dot(gsea_go,    "GO_GSEA",      "GO BP GSEA (preranked)")
make_dot(gsea_go_MF, "GO_MF_GSEA",   "GO MF GSEA (preranked)")

# — cnetplots ----------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(as.data.frame(ego)) > 0)
  save_plot(cnetplot(ego, showCategory = 10, node_label = "all"),
            "cnetplot_GO_ORA.pdf", 9, 8)

enrich_list <- list(GO_ORA = ego, KEGG_ORA = ekegg,
                    Reactome_ORA = ereact, GO_GSEA = gsea_go)
for (stub in names(enrich_list)) {
  res <- enrich_list[[stub]]; df <- as.data.frame(res)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) next
  nCat <- min(10, nrow(df))
  tryCatch({
    p <- cnetplot(res, showCategory = nCat, foldChange = fc_vec, node_label = "all") +
      ggplot2::ggtitle(glue::glue("{stub}: cnetplot (top {nCat} terms)"))
    save_plot(p, sprintf("cnetplot_%s.pdf", stub), 9, 8)
  }, error = function(e) message("cnetplot skipped for ", stub, ": ", e$message))
}

# — emapplot -----------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(as.data.frame(ego)) > 0) {
  ego_sim <- pairwise_termsim(ego)
  save_plot(enrichplot::emapplot(ego_sim, showCategory = 30), "emapplot_GO_ORA.pdf", 9, 7)
}

# — GSEA running score -------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0) {
  pdf(file.path(dir_plots, "gsea_running_score.pdf"), 9, 6)
  for (id in head(gsea_go@result$ID, N_gsea_running_score))
    print(enrichplot::gseaplot2(gsea_go, geneSetID = id))
  dev.off()
}

# — Leading-edge bar charts --------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(leading_edge_long) > 0) {
  for (term in unique(leading_edge_long$ID)) {
    le_term <- leading_edge_long %>% dplyr::filter(ID == term, !is.na(logFC))
    if (nrow(le_term) == 0) next
    topN_le <- le_term %>% dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(logFC))) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = N_leading_edge_top)
    p <- ggplot(topN_le, aes(x = reorder(gene_label, logFC), y = logFC, fill = logFC)) +
      geom_col() + coord_flip() +
      labs(title = glue::glue("Leading-edge genes: {unique(topN_le$Description)}"),
           x = "Gene symbol", y = "log2 fold change") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
      scale_fill_gradient2(low = "royalblue", mid = "white", high = "firebrick")
    save_plot(p, sprintf("gsea_leading_edge_%s.pdf", term), 8, 5)
  }
}

# — Sankey: genes → KEGG pathways → class -----------------------------------
if (nrow(ekegg_df) > 0) {
  kegg_top    <- ekegg_df %>% dplyr::slice_head(n = N_sankey_paths)
  gene_lookup <- tbl %>% dplyr::select(ENTREZID, gene_label)

  links_g2p <- kegg_top %>%
    dplyr::select(Description, geneID) %>%
    tidyr::separate_rows(geneID, sep = "/") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(gene_lookup, by = c("geneID" = "ENTREZID")) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(source = gene_label, target = Description, value = 1L) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(source))

  if (!"Class" %in% names(kegg_top)) kegg_top$Class <- "Unknown class"
  links_p2c <- kegg_top %>%
    dplyr::transmute(source = Description, target = Class, value = Count)

  links_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(links_g2p, links_p2c)
  nodes <- data.frame(name = unique(c(links_all$source, links_all$target)))
  links_all$source <- match(links_all$source, nodes$name) - 1L
  links_all$target <- match(links_all$target, nodes$name) - 1L

  sankey <- networkD3::sankeyNetwork(
    Links = links_all, Nodes = nodes,
    Source = "source", Target = "target", Value = "value",
    NodeID = "name", fontSize = 12, nodeWidth = 22, sinksRight = FALSE)
  out_file <- file.path(dir_interactive, "sankey_genes_kegg.html")
  htmlwidgets::saveWidget(sankey, file = out_file, selfcontained = TRUE)
  message("Sankey diagram written: ", out_file)
}
```

```{r neural, include=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# NEURAL SUBSET
# =============================================================================

neural_ora     <- filter_neural(ego)
neural_gsea    <- filter_neural(gsea_go)
neural_ora_MF  <- filter_neural(ego_MF)
neural_gsea_MF <- filter_neural(gsea_go_MF)

# Dotplots for neural subsets
if (nrow(neural_ora)  > 0) make_dot(neural_ora,  "GO_ORA_NEURAL",  "Neural GO-BP ORA (subset)",
                                    subdir = dir_neural_plots)
if (nrow(neural_gsea) > 0) make_dot(neural_gsea, "GO_GSEA_NEURAL", "Neural GO-BP GSEA (subset)",
                                    subdir = dir_neural_plots)

# Ridgeplot for neural GSEA BP
if (nrow(neural_gsea) >= 3 && "ID" %in% names(neural_gsea)) {
  neural_rows <- which(gsea_go@result$ID %in% na.omit(neural_gsea$ID))
  if (length(neural_rows) >= 3) {
    N_ridge <- min(length(neural_rows), N_neural_ridgeplot)
    gsea_go_neural <- gsea_go
    gsea_go_neural@result <- gsea_go@result[neural_rows, , drop = FALSE]
    pdf(file.path(dir_neural_plots, "ridgeplot_GO_GSEA_NEURAL.pdf"), 7, 0.5 * N_ridge + 2)
    print(enrichplot::ridgeplot(gsea_go_neural, showCategory = N_ridge) +
            labs(x = "Enrichment score (NES)", y = NULL) +
            theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)))
    dev.off()
  }
}

# cnetplot for neural ORA
if (nrow(neural_ora) > 1) {
  neural_ids <- unique(na.omit(neural_ora$ID))
  neural_ego <- ego
  neural_ego@result <- dplyr::filter(ego@result, ID %in% neural_ids)
  p <- cnetplot(neural_ego, showCategory = min(15, length(neural_ids)),
                foldChange = fc_vec, node_label = "all")
  save_plot(p, "cnetplot_GO_ORA_NEURAL.pdf", 10, 8, subdir = dir_neural_plots)
}

# Heatmap of neural gene logFC
if (nrow(neural_ora) > 0 || nrow(neural_gsea) > 0) {
  neural_gene_vec <- unique(unlist(strsplit(
    c(if ("Genes" %in% names(neural_ora)) neural_ora$Genes else character(0),
      if ("core_enrichment" %in% names(neural_gsea)) neural_gsea$core_enrichment
      else character(0)), "/")))
  neural_gene_tbl <- tbl %>% dplyr::filter(ENTREZID %in% neural_gene_vec)
  if (nrow(neural_gene_tbl) > 0) {
    mat <- matrix(neural_gene_tbl$logFC, nrow = 1,
                  dimnames = list(NULL, neural_gene_tbl$gene_label))
    col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
      c(-max(abs(mat)), 0, max(abs(mat))),
      c("royalblue","white","firebrick"))
    pdf(file.path(dir_neural_plots, "heatmap_neural_gene_logFC.pdf"), 8, 2.5)
    ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(mat, name = "log2FC", col = col_fun,
                            cluster_columns = TRUE, show_row_names = FALSE,
                            column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 7))
    dev.off()
  }
}

# Neural summary export
neural_summary <- data.frame(
  Set        = c("Neural ORA (BP)","Neural GSEA (BP)","Neural ORA (MF)","Neural GSEA (MF)"),
  N_terms    = c(nrow(neural_ora), nrow(neural_gsea), nrow(neural_ora_MF), nrow(neural_gsea_MF)),
  Top_BP_ORA  = c(if (nrow(neural_ora)  > 0) neural_ora$Description[1]  else NA, NA, NA, NA),
  Top_BP_GSEA = c(NA, if (nrow(neural_gsea) > 0) neural_gsea$Description[1] else NA, NA, NA),
  Top_MF_ORA  = c(NA, NA, if (nrow(neural_ora_MF)  > 0) neural_ora_MF$Description[1]  else NA, NA),
  Top_MF_GSEA = c(NA, NA, NA, if (nrow(neural_gsea_MF) > 0) neural_gsea_MF$Description[1] else NA))

export_sheets(
  list(Neural_GO_BP_ORA  = neural_ora,
       Neural_GO_BP_GSEA = neural_gsea,
       Neural_GO_MF_ORA  = neural_ora_MF,
       Neural_GO_MF_GSEA = neural_gsea_MF,
       Neural_Summary    = neural_summary),
  "enrichment_neural_only.xlsx")
```

```{r plots-post-neural, include=FALSE}
# logFC distribution panels — Neural facet now real (neural chunk has run)
plot_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  tbl          %>% dplyr::transmute(logFC, Category = "All mapped"),
  tbl_sig_base %>% dplyr::transmute(logFC, Category = "Significant"),
  if (exists("neural_gene_tbl") && nrow(neural_gene_tbl) > 0)
    neural_gene_tbl %>% dplyr::transmute(logFC, Category = "Neural")
  else
    data.frame(logFC = numeric(0), Category = character(0))
)
plot_df$Category <- factor(plot_df$Category,
                           levels = c("All mapped","Significant","Neural"))

p_lfc <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = logFC)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)),   # fix: was ..density..
                 bins = 50, fill = "grey75", colour = "black") +
  geom_density(colour = "navy", linewidth = 0.9, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ Category, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of log2 fold changes",
       x = "log2 fold change", y = "Density") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
save_plot(p_lfc, "logFC_distribution_panels.pdf", 7, 9)
```

```{r session, include=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# SESSION — save R objects + sessionInfo
# =============================================================================

saveRDS(
  list(ego        = ego,
       ekegg      = ekegg,
       ereact     = ereact,
       gsea_go    = gsea_go,
       gsea_go_MF = gsea_go_MF,
       gsea_kegg  = gsea_kegg,
       fc_vec     = fc_vec),
  file.path(dir_data, "enrichment_objects.rds"))

writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()),
           file.path(dir_data, "sessionInfo.txt"))

cat("\n  All done! See 'output/' for tables, figures, SVGs, and widgets.\n")
cat(sprintf("  Subdirectories: plots/, plots/dotplots/, plots/neural/, data/, pathview/, interactive/, cache/, additional/\n"))
```

```{r user-new-enrichment, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# EXTENSION TEMPLATE: Add a new enrichment database
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Set eval=TRUE and give this chunk a new label to activate.
# All enrichment results are cached — this chunk adds without re-running them.
#
# Objects available: tbl, fc_vec, sig_genes, gene_universe, ranks, orgDb,
#   ego, ego_MF, ekegg, ekegg_df, ereact, gsea_go, gsea_go_MF, gsea_kegg,
#   neural_pattern, targeted_pathways,
#   dir_plots, dir_dotplots, dir_data, dir_add (use dir_add for new outputs)

# Example — MSigDB Hallmarks ORA (requires msigdbr):
# library(msigdbr)
# msig_h <- msigdbr(species = "Gallus gallus", category = "H") %>%
#   dplyr::select(gs_name, entrez_gene) %>%
#   dplyr::mutate(entrez_gene = as.character(entrez_gene))
# e_hallmark <- safe_run(
#   enricher(gene=sig_genes, universe=gene_universe, TERM2GENE=msig_h), "Hallmarks")
# if (is.null(e_hallmark)) e_hallmark <- new("enrichResult")
# make_dot(e_hallmark, "Hallmarks_ORA", "MSigDB Hallmarks ORA", subdir=dir_add)
# export_sheets(list(Hallmarks_ORA = as_df(e_hallmark)),
#               "hallmarks_ORA_results.xlsx", subdir=dir_add)
```

```{r user-new-subset, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# EXTENSION TEMPLATE: Add a new keyword-filtered subset analysis
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Mirrors the neural chunk. Change keywords, stub names, and output file names.

# immune_keywords <- c("immun","inflamm","interleukin","cytokine",
#                      "T cell","B cell","macrophage","interferon","toll")
# immune_pattern  <- paste(immune_keywords, collapse = "|")
#
# immune_ora  <- filter_neural(ego,     pattern = immune_pattern)
# immune_gsea <- filter_neural(gsea_go, pattern = immune_pattern)
#
# if (nrow(immune_ora)  > 0)
#   make_dot(immune_ora,  "GO_ORA_IMMUNE",  "Immune GO-BP ORA",  subdir = dir_add)
# if (nrow(immune_gsea) > 0)
#   make_dot(immune_gsea, "GO_GSEA_IMMUNE", "Immune GO-BP GSEA", subdir = dir_add)
#
# export_sheets(list(Immune_ORA=immune_ora, Immune_GSEA=immune_gsea),
#               "enrichment_immune_subset.xlsx", subdir=dir_add)
```
